item.title: Gold surges on Fed pause signal
item.description: Gold prices jumped as the Federal Reserve signaled a pause in rate hikes, boosting safe-haven demand.

item.title: Apple launches new iPhone
item.description: Apple announced a new iPhone model today with upgraded camera features.

item.title: Dollar strengthens, gold slides on hawkish Fed
item.description: DXY rallied and gold fell amid hawkish Fed commentary on inflation and interest rates.
